chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-5821 of 2019 Abdul Majeed Versus VIth Additional Session Judge South Karachi and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Direction 1. For order on Misc. No.27841/2022. 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 17.04.2024 None present..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Since last several dates the petitioner’s counsel is not attending the matter and so also today. There is no intimation either. Since it is consistent absence of the petitioner and as also not informing this court today about the absence, the petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
